DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DK CONSULTING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-23-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DK CONSULTING INC. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RESUBMIT ZOOM REQUEST; ZOOM GRANTED FILED ON FEB-16-2023 IS EXTENDED TO NEXT COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [SCOTT D CASS - COMPLIANCE OFFICER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF] FILED BY PLAINTIFF DK CONSULTING INC.
